name: Bizzabo Event Experience API
what_it_does: Bizzabo REST API for event experience platform covering in-person, virtual, and hybrid events. Enables AI agents to query event data, retrieve attendee registrations and networking connections, access engagement analytics, and integrate event intelligence into marketing and CRM workflows. Bizzabo is known for its networking and engagement features.
use_cases: Querying event registration and check-in data from event operations agents
Retrieving attendee networking and engagement metrics from event analytics agents
Accessing session attendance and speaker data from event content agents
Integrating Bizzabo event data into CRM and post-event nurture workflows
not_for: Consumer ticketing (Bizzabo is enterprise B2B events focused)
Small simple events without enterprise features
best_when: A B2B marketing team using Bizzabo for conferences and events wants AI agents to analyze attendee engagement, surface networking data, and integrate event intelligence into CRM follow-up workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Attendee data and networking interactions are personal data. GDPR compliance required. Bizzabo is enterprise-priced.

auth.notes: Bizzabo OAuth 2.0 with client credentials. App registration in Bizzabo developer portal. Enterprise access required.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise event platform pricing negotiated with Bizzabo
pricing.notes: Enterprise event platform. Pricing not publicly listed. Contact Bizzabo sales.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API application; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Attendee PII and networking interaction data requires GDPR compliance
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
API access requires enterprise Bizzabo agreement
Bizzabo acquired by Hopin then RingCentral — verify API stability and continuity
Networking data (who connected with whom) is particularly sensitive personal data
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Event attendee PII and networking interaction data. SOC2, GDPR. EU data residency. OAuth2. Corporate ownership transitions — verify service continuity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Event attendee data and professional networking interactions. SOC2, GDPR. EU data residency.
